articles.title: Foxes' demise 'sad to see' says title-winning captain Morgan
articles.summary: Wes Morgan is "sad and hurt" to see Leicester drop into League One a decade after winning the Premier League.

articles.title: When are the 2026-27 Premier League fixtures released?
articles.summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains when the fixtures for the 2026-27 Premier League season are released.

articles.title: Pietersen: Cook has no idea what IPL is like - 'Bethell should ignore him'
articles.summary: Kevin Pietersen reignited his long-running feud with Sir Alastair Cook over his former England team-mate's criticisms of Jacob Bethell being at the Indian Premier League.

articles.title: Coincidence?! Arteta wins Rangers the league on goal difference with last min penalty!
articles.summary: Flashback to 2003 where Rangers needed to score one more goal against Dunfermline to win the league on goal difference. With the title on the line, up stepped Mikel Arteta to take an injury-time penal...

articles.title: Bournemouth latest: 'I cannot accept Leeds goal' - Iraola incensed by last-gasp equaliser
Advantage Man City? 'Queen bee' Guardiola leads them to summit
articles.summary: It took just five minutes for chants of "we are top of the league" to ring out around Turf Moor, as the title pendulum continues to shift towards Manchester City.

articles.title: Two down, one to go - who will join Burnley & Wolves?
articles.summary: With Wolves and Burnley now relegated, BBC Sport looks at which side is most likely to join them in the Championship next season.

articles.title: Hapless Chelsea owners have built a monument to chaos and decline
articles.summary: Chelsea owners BlueCo have built a monument to chaos and decline at Stamford Bridge, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

articles.title: Man City move top with win as Burnley relegation confirmed
articles.summary: Manchester City continue their charge towards the Premier League title with victory at Turf Moor to move Pep Guardiola's side top of the table and relegate Burnley back to the Championship.

articles.title: Leeds score late to earn draw at Bournemouth
articles.summary: Sean Longstaff scores a dramatic 97th-minute equaliser as Leeds took another step towards Premier League survival in an eventful draw at Bournemouth.

articles.title: Man City focusing on winning 'all five games' in title run-in - Guardiola
articles.summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his side is focusing on winning "all fives games" during the title run-in, after their 1-0 win against Burnley in the Premier League.

articles.title: Iraola frustrated after Leeds' equaliser was not ruled out for offside
articles.summary: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola is frustrated with the decision to not rule out Sean Longstaff's 97th-minute equaliser for Leeds as a player was "offside in front of his goalkeeper".

articles.title: Farke delighted with hard-fought point at Bournemouth
articles.summary: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is full of praise for the "mentality" of his side as Sean Longstaff's 97th-minute goal earned his side a "hard-fought" point away at Bournemouth.

articles.title: How are leaders Hearts handling title pressure?
articles.summary: With five games to go Hearts are still top of the Scottish Premiership. So how are the unlikely league leaders handling the heat with five games to go?

articles.title: 'Turning football into rubble' - fury over VAR ruling
articles.summary: A referee has to be escorted off the pitch by police after a controversial VAR decision in the Asian Champions League semi-finals sparks fury.

articles.title: Wrexham's reluctant hero who refuses to celebrate
articles.summary: He may not celebrate, but Josh Windass is giving fans plenty to shout about as Wrexham bid for a Championship play-off place.

articles.summary: Who are England's Test match candidates? Michael Atherton and Nasser Hussain discuss the impact of James Rew in the County Championship.

articles.title: Leicester fans demand change as Rowett urges action after relegation
articles.summary: Leicester City fans demand change at the club after relegation to League One, while manager Gary Rowett says "decisive action" is needed.
